=== #12 ===
#12 Add CI validation workflow for PRs
## Summary

There is currently no CI workflow that runs code quality checks on pull requests. A `validate.yml` GitHub Actions workflow is needed to enforce quality gates before merge.

## Problem

- PRs can be merged without any automated checks
- No lint, type-check, test, or build validation on PRs
- Quality regressions can be introduced silently

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `.github/workflows/validate.yml` GitHub Actions workflow
- [ ] Triggers on `pull_request` to `main` branch
- [ ] Runs: lint (`npm run lint` or equivalent)
- [ ] Runs: type checking (`tsc --noEmit` or equivalent)
- [ ] Runs: unit tests (`npm test` or equivalent)
- [ ] Runs: build verification (`npm run build` or equivalent)
- [ ] Appropriate Node.js version matrix
- [ ] Caching for `node_modules` to speed up runs
- [ ] Required status check configured on `main` branch protection

> Migrated from zivtech/joyus-ai-archive-20260304#22

=== #13 ===
#13 Fix docker compose startup hang and cron-parser ESM crash
## Summary

Two issues blocking local Docker-based development:

### 1. Docker Compose startup hang

`docker-compose.yml` uses `drizzle-kit push` which can hang waiting for interactive confirmation. Needs to be switched to `drizzle-kit migrate` which runs non-interactively.

### 2. cron-parser v4 ESM import crash

`cron-parser` v4 is an ESM-only package. The current CommonJS-style import causes a runtime crash. The import needs to be updated to use dynamic `import()` or the package needs to be pinned to a CJS-compatible version.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `docker-compose.yml` updated to use `drizzle-kit migrate` instead of `drizzle-kit push`
- [ ] `cron-parser` import fixed to handle ESM correctly
- [ ] Docker Compose startup completes without hanging
- [ ] Scheduler functionality works after the cron-parser fix
- [ ] Tested with `docker compose up` from clean state

## Origin

This was unmerged PR work from the previous repository that needs to be re-evaluated and applied.

=== #22 ===
#22 Fix Playwright health check URL and cron-parser ESM import
## Issues found during production deployment (joyus-ai-ops WP07)

### 1. Playwright health check hits non-existent `/health` endpoint

**File:** `joyus-ai-mcp-server/src/index.ts`

The aggregated health check and the `/health/playwright` route both fetch `http://playwright:3002/health`, but the `@playwright/mcp` server has no `/health` endpoint. It serves `/mcp` (streamable HTTP) and `/sse` (legacy SSE).

**Current (broken):**
```typescript
const response = await fetch('http://playwright:3002/health', {
```

**Fix:**
```typescript
const response = await fetch('http://playwright:3002/mcp', {
```

This appears in two places in `src/index.ts` — both the `/health/playwright` route and the aggregated `/health` route.

### 2. cron-parser ESM/CJS incompatibility

**File:** `joyus-ai-mcp-server/src/scheduler/index.ts`

```typescript
// Current (breaks on Node 20 ESM):
import { parseExpression } from 'cron-parser';

// Fix (either option):
// Option A: Default import with destructure
import cronParser from 'cron-parser';
const { parseExpression } = cronParser;

// Option B: Upgrade to cron-parser v5 which has proper ESM exports
npm install cron-parser@5
```

### 3. Add `@anthropic-ai/sdk` to dependencies (for web chat API)

The web chat API route (`src/routes/chat.ts`) needs the Anthropic SDK:
```bash
npm install @anthropic-ai/sdk
```

### 4. Add web chat static serving and API route

**Files:**
- `src/routes/chat.ts` — new, POST `/chat/api/message` with Claude API proxy
- `src/index.ts` — add `express.static` for `/chat` path serving `web-chat/` directory

See detailed notes in `joyus-ai-internal/joyus-ai/deploy/web-chat-routing-note.md` and `cron-parser-esm-fix-note.md`.

---

All issues are currently patched on the EC2 instance at build time. These source-level fixes will make the patches unnecessary.
